name: Google Maps Business Lookup
description: Fetch structured Google Business Profile data for any business: rating, review count, address, phone, website, opening hours, categories, and thumbnail. Accepts a business name with optional location, or a full Google Maps place URL. Uses Serper Maps API — fast and reliable.

query.description: Business name to look up (e.g. 'Neosmile Dental Hospital Ahmedabad') OR a full Google Maps place URL.

location.description: Optional location hint to narrow results. Can be a city name (e.g. 'Ahmedabad') or lat,lng coordinates (e.g. '23.014,72.527').

num.description: Max number of results to fetch from Serper (default: 5). The best match is returned as primary.
